tables.name: products
tables.description: Product catalog containing product identifiers, categories, and package dimensions.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each product.

columns.name: product_category_name
columns.description: Category or product family name.

columns.name: product_weight_g
columns.description: Product weight.

columns.name: product_length_cm
columns.description: Product package length.

columns.name: product_height_cm
columns.description: Product package height.

columns.name: product_width_cm
columns.description: Product package width.

tables.name: orders
tables.description: Order records with customer ownership, order status, purchase approval, delivery, and estimated delivery timestamps.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each order.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Customer identifier linked to the customers table.

columns.name: order_status
columns.description: Current order state such as delivered or canceled.

columns.name: order_purchase_timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the order was purchased.

columns.name: order_approved_at
columns.description: Date and time when the order was approved.

columns.name: order_delivered_timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the order was delivered.

columns.name: order_estimated_delivery_date
columns.description: Estimated delivery date for the order.

tables.name: payments
tables.description: Payment records for orders, including payment method, installment count, and paid amount.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Order identifier linked to the orders table.

columns.name: payment_sequential
columns.description: Sequence number for payments when an order has multiple payment events.

columns.name: payment_type
columns.description: Payment method used for the order.

columns.name: payment_installments
columns.description: Number of installments used for the payment.

columns.name: payment_value
columns.description: Total payment amount.
columns.unit: currency amount; currency not specified in dataset

tables.name: order_items
tables.description: Line-item level order data connecting orders, products, sellers, item prices, and shipping charges.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Order identifier linked to the orders table.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Product identifier linked to the products table.

columns.name: seller_id
columns.description: Identifier of the seller for the order item.

columns.name: price
columns.description: Item sale price.
columns.unit: currency amount; currency not specified in dataset

columns.name: shipping_charges
columns.description: Shipping charge for the order item.
columns.unit: currency amount; currency not specified in dataset

tables.name: customers
tables.description: Customer location table containing customer identifiers, zip code prefixes, cities, and states.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each customer.

columns.name: customer_zip_code_prefix
columns.description: Customer zip code prefix.

columns.name: customer_city
columns.description: Customer city.

columns.name: customer_state
columns.description: Customer state abbreviation.
